heroHeadline: "DtMF" Sets All-Time Hot Latin Songs Record — 57 Weeks at No. 1, Breaking "Despacito"
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. "DtMF" (Debí Tirar Más Fotos) logged its 57th consecutive week at No. 1 on Billboard Hot Latin Songs (chart dated May 2, 2026), shattering the previous all-time record of 56 weeks held by "Despacito" — the longest No. 1 run in the chart's 60+ year history. Spotify's 20th anniversary confirmed Bad Bunny #2 all-time most-streamed artist globally; Un Verano Sin Ti is the most-streamed album in Spotify history (22B+ streams). European leg of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour opens May 22 in Barcelona — 10 sold-out Madrid nights to follow.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, Remezcla, SoleRetriever, Deadline, Variety, CNN, and major media
